caption: A group of people wearing aprons and gloves are gathered around a table, preparing kimchi together as part of the traditional Korean communal kimchi-making practice known as Kimjang.
A person wearing black gloves is holding a piece of seasoned napa cabbage over a bowl filled with kimchi, showcasing the vibrant red chili paste and green onions.
A group of individuals dressed in white hanbok are waving the Taegeukgi, celebrating an event marked as the 104th anniversary.

The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional and modern attire, with one person holding a document and another wearing goggles, set against a backdrop featuring the Taegeukgi, the national flag of Korea.

The image depicts a person wearing a vibrant red Jeontonghonrye, a traditional Korean wedding hanbok, adorned with intricate floral patterns and a decorative headpiece, standing indoors near an open door.
A couple dressed in traditional Korean hanbok is seated before a ritual table adorned with offerings, engaging in a ceremony, with two onlookers in formal attire observing in the background.

The image depicts a traditional Korean ancestral rite setup, featuring a ritual table adorned with various food offerings such as fruits, nuts, and pastries, set against a backdrop of calligraphy panels.
A group of individuals dressed in traditional Korean attire is gathered around a ritual table adorned with food offerings, performing deep bows as part of an ancestral rite.
A group of individuals is standing in a line, bowing in respect at a memorial site adorned with statues and surrounded by greenery.
A group of men in formal attire is gathered at a grave site, bowing and paying respects, with a small South Korean flag and offerings placed on the ground.
The image shows a Cheomseongdae observatory illuminated at night, featuring a cylindrical stacked-stone tower with a square top frame, standing in an open field.
The image shows a Cheomseongdae observatory, a Korean stone structure with a cylindrical stacked-stone tower and a square top frame, situated in an open field under a clear sky.
The illuminated Gyeongbokgung palace stands majestically under a deep blue sky, showcasing its traditional wooden architecture with upturned eaves and vibrant dancheong colors.
The image shows a traditional Korean palace with wooden pavilions featuring upturned eaves and colorful dancheong paintwork, situated on a raised stone platform.
The image shows a restored urban stream in Seoul, Cheonggyecheon, with a shallow waterway bordered by stone embankments and pedestrian walkways alongside.
The image shows a statue of Admiral Yi Sun-shin, a Korean naval hero, standing on a pedestal in a public square surrounded by modern buildings and trees.
Two individuals are performing a Jeol and Sebae, kneeling and bowing deeply with hands on the floor in front of an altar adorned with flowers and a framed portrait.
A family is gathered in a living room, with two children in traditional hanbok performing a Jeol, while an older woman and man sit on the floor observing.
A group of people dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are gathered in a living room, with two individuals performing a Jeol and Sebae, kneeling and bowing deeply with hands on the floor.
A group of individuals stands in front of a statue of Sejongdaewang, wearing traditional white uniforms and black skirts, with a large golden globe at their feet.
The image shows a statue of King Sejong the Great, seated in royal Joseon robes with a winged crown, illuminated at night with Korean text and flags in the background.
A person is flying a colorful kite in an open grassy area under a clear sky.
A person is flying a kite in a park under a clear sky.
A group of people is gathered around a colorful floral mat on the floor, engaging in a traditional Korean activity.
Two children dressed in hanbok are sitting on the floor, playing a game involving wooden sticks and a game board.
A group of people dressed in traditional Korean attire is performing a circular dance on a wooden platform with a bridge and flags in the background.
A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing a circular dance on stage under a full moon.
The image shows a performer dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a yellow top with a purple sash and a blue skirt, with arms outstretched, likely participating in a Talchum performance.
The image displays a collection of intricately painted wooden masks, each with unique facial expressions and patterns, hanging on a grid display.
The image shows a bowl of ramyeon with yellow curly noodles and an orange-red broth, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim of the bowl.
The image shows a pot of ramyeon and a container of kimchi on a white surface.
The image shows a box containing neatly arranged gimbap, which are Korean seaweed rice rolls, sliced into round pieces and topped with sesame seeds.
The image shows a plate of small, round, golden-brown patties coated with an egg batter, resembling Korean pan-fried meatballs known as Wanja-jeon.
The image displays a variety of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring colorful, textured surfaces with small decorative pieces and pressed floral or geometric patterns.
The image shows a box of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, featuring various pastel-colored decorative pieces and pressed floral patterns.
The image shows a bowl of yaksik, a traditional Korean sweet rice dish, placed on a checkered cloth atop a bamboo mat.
The image shows a plate of yakgwa, small flower-shaped or round deep-fried pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze, garnished with green leaves and small yellow flowers.
The image shows a dish of Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced beef and vegetables in a pan, likely being cooked over a heat source.

The image shows a bowl of tteokguk, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with green onions, red chili pepper, and other toppings.

The image shows a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes (tteok) and crescent-shaped dumplings (mandu), garnished with a sprig of seaweed and a slice of green onion.
The image shows a plate of Japchae, featuring translucent brown noodles mixed with colorful julienned vegetables and topped with sesame seeds.
The image shows a traditional Korean building with a tiled roof and colorful decorations, situated atop a stone wall, under a clear blue sky.
The image shows a traditional Korean courtyard surrounded by stone walls and wooden buildings with curved tile roofs, characteristic of a Haenggung.
The image shows a traditional Korean gate with a red wooden door and a curved tiled roof, surrounded by stone walls and adorned with red flags.
The image shows a modern architectural structure with a disc-shaped deck and a pointed spire, situated amidst green hills under an overcast sky.
The image depicts soldiers in military uniforms gathered around a truck and equipment in a rural setting, likely during the Korean War era, as evidenced by their attire and the style of the vehicles.
The image depicts a scene of a war-torn area with damaged buildings and power lines, likely from the Korean War era, as evidenced by the overall desolation and the style of the structures.
The image depicts a traditional Korean village scene with thatched-roof houses and people gathered near a body of water, set against a backdrop of rolling hills.
A family is playing Jegichagi in a park, kicking colorful shuttlecocks with their feet.
A young boy is dressed in traditional Korean attire, including a pink vest and gray pants, while kicking a small blue shuttlecock in the air.
